lines.description: Number of lines to return from the end (default 200, max ~8000 chars)

key_path.description: Windows registry key path, e.g. HKCU\\Software\\Wine\\DllOverrides or HKLM\\System\\CurrentControlSet\\Control

value_name.description: Optional: specific value name to read. If omitted, returns all values in the section.

question.description: The question to ask the user

options.description: Optional: numbered choices to present to the user

data.description: Registry data in .reg format: dword:00000001, "string", hex:ff,00,...

verb.description: Winetricks verb to install. Allowed verbs: dotnet48, dotnet40, dotnet35, vcrun2019, vcrun2015, vcrun2013, vcrun2010, vcrun2008, d3dx9, d3dx10, d3dx11_43, d3dcompiler_47, dinput8, dinput, quartz, wmp9, wmp10, dsound, xinput, physx, xact, xactengine3_7

dll_name.description: DLL name from the known registry (e.g. cnc-ddraw)

target.description: Placement target. If omitted, auto-detects: system DLLs use syswow64 in wow64 bottles, others use game_dir.

extra_winedebug.description: Optional additional WINEDEBUG channels (e.g. +d3d,+opengl). Merged with existing WINEDEBUG.

diagnostic.description: If true, this is a quick diagnostic launch (shorter timeout, more verbose output). Does NOT count toward the 8-launch limit. Default false.

name.description: Human-readable recipe name (e.g. 'Cossacks European Wars - Working Config')

notes.description: Optional notes about the configuration or what fixed the game

relative_path.description: File path relative to the game executable directory (e.g. 'ddraw.ini' or 'data/mode.dat')

content.description: The text content to write to the file

relative_path.description: File path relative to the game executable directory (e.g. 'DeusEx.ini' or 'data/config.cfg')

timeout_seconds.description: Seconds to wait before killing the process (default 5)

paths.description: Relative file paths to check from the game executable's directory

game_id.description: Exact game ID to look up (e.g. 'cossacks-european-wars')

symptom.description: Symptom description for fuzzy matching against known pitfalls (e.g. 'black screen on launch')

similar_games.description: Find games with similar characteristics. Returns cross-game matches ranked by signal overlap (engine weight 3, graphics_api weight 2, tags weight 1 each, symptom weight 1). Requires at least engine or graphics_api.

dll_overrides.description: DLL overrides applied. Each object: {dll, mode, placement?, source?}

game_config_files.description: Game config files modified. Each: {path, purpose, critical_settings?}

registry.description: Registry entries set. Each: {key, value_name, data, purpose?}

game_specific_dlls.description: Game-specific DLLs placed. Each: {filename, source, placement, version?}

pitfalls.description: Pitfalls encountered. Each: {symptom, cause, fix, wrong_fix?}

resolution_narrative.description: Free-text narrative of the resolution process and what finally worked

query.description: Search query for Wine compatibility info (e.g. 'Cossacks European Wars Wine compatibility')

url.description: URL to fetch and extract text from

game_name.description: Game name to search for (e.g. 'Deus Ex', 'Cossacks European Wars')

query.description: Search query — game name, engine, symptom, or keyword (e.g. 'directdraw black screen', 'unity wine crash', 'dxvk apple silicon')

narrative.description: Prose describing what you tried, what worked partially, and the final blocker. 2-5 sentences. Be specific.

blocking_symptom.description: Short tag for the failure mode (e.g. 'd3d9_init_fail', 'intro_video_crash', 'menu_freeze').

content.description: One short observation (1-3 sentences). Will be timestamped and attached to the session log.
